characters.name: Albert
characters.description: Albertis the male hamster who belongs toGeorge. He is the only character confirmed to have the same name in the English and French versions.

characters.name: Albert
characters.description: Albertis the male hamster who belongs toGeorge. He is the only character confirmed to have the same name in the English and French versions.

characters.name: Alice
characters.description: Aliceis the aunt ofGudule/BGandGaston/George. She is their maternal aunt - she is the sister of theirmom. Tante Alicein the original was translated asAunt Alicein the English dub. In the English dub she is voiced byStephanie Morgenstern

characters.name: Alice
characters.description: Aliceis the aunt ofGudule/BGandGaston/George. She is their maternal aunt - she is the sister of theirmom. Tante Alicein the original was translated asAunt Alicein the English dub. In the English dub she is voiced byStephanie Morgenstern

characters.name: Belinda
characters.description: Belindais a musical celebrity whoBGis a fan of. A poster can regularly be seen of her on BG's bedroom wall next to that of a soccer player. Belinda has blonde hair and wears a red tie over an untucked dark pink dress shirt (with white collar and cuffs) over a light pink skirt, posing with her hands on her hips. InBedtime, BG stays up late to watch one of her concerts on television.

characters.name: Bertrand
characters.description: Unlike Gad Intellect; Alex is Competitive Close Contender: (First Runner-Up) He likes to competes against the victory winner Miss. B.G. and he a bit of a show-off. Alex and B.G. most often is selected on the spot (Pick Me Episode!) He tends to get carried away what he's is trying explain and is B.G.'s reinforcement even though it might cost B.G. a comic book. Alex has blond hair and blue eyes. He is slightly skinny, and mostly wears red glasses, a green and white striped shirt and blue jeans with red sneakers. Alex has an older brother namedRobbie. characters.name: Billy
characters.description: Paulo(EnglishBillyvoiced byDarcy Smith) Billy is 10-years-old, he is the oldest inBG's class. He thinks the rest of his colleagues as babies. He is also kind of a bully who dominates the school for now. Sports: Billy is the Soccer Goldie and in third spot underestimated Competor over Gad. He still has to compete against the Victory Winner Miss. B.G. and First Runners-Up: Alex. Gad is a Close Contender not too far behind them. Billy is a great skater and he likes to show off his skills to BG and all her friends. He also has a crush onBrittany-Ann. In Case of Domination Bullies Competeor's: There is a always a Challenger: A Brave, Tough; Student or Colleague always one step ahead on the rise.

characters.name: Brittany-Ann McAdams
characters.description: Brittany-Ann McAdams(originally namedMarie-Aglaé LeGrandin the French version) is the most popular girl who lives in the neighborhood. Some may perceive her as prosperous rich, dignified and unrefined spoiled. Brittany-Ann is not too considerate or pleasant to Miss. BG, but she is really a lot nicer to the other children, their parents, and her teachers; she tries to impress them all. Brittany has friends who join her:Kaylaand (Billy: who has a crush on her!) Brittany is considered arrogant and self-centered and gets a lot of attention. Her only issue: They will follow what ever she does, want or likes, whatever she tells them to do (an mirror image) To Miss. B.G. Dismay.  Brittany-Ann shows her nicer side to Miss BG when it's just between them: acting like (Sisterly Neighbourly Acquaintances;) a bit of a stretch. characters.name: Carla Dechumin
characters.description: Kayla(voiced byMelanie Tonello, originally namedCarla Dechuminin French version)) isBrittany-Ann's best friend is always dependent, gravitating to be exactly like her, an mirror Image. In fact, she basically copy of everything what Brittany-Ann tells her to do, to much of BG's nerves: (Kayla's Loyalism Consideration.) Kayla also has a hamster just like B.G.'s little brother George. His name isTitus, the Gerbil looks just like George's hamster;Albert. Both are Identical and cannot be told apart!  Response Time: however is Different! The Problem: Secretly?

characters.name: Dad
characters.description: Pap's:Jeffery Garcia:(EnglishDadvoiced byNeil Crone) is the father ofBGandGeorge. Good-natured and easygoing, he is the local vet. He's aware that BG has him wrapped around her little finger, After All; she's Daddy's little Girl! He usually says "yes" to anything while watching TV on the rare occasion's; may or may not be paying attention (Screen Time). Whenever he says: "no," a few tears will work wonders. Still; Realization:  If He Discovers or Finds out what has occurred; Even Dad has his breaking point. When he makes up his mind his decision is final; that's it, I had enough! No-one, not even Miss. B.G. can change his mind for him. He is married toCharlotte: their Mom!

characters.name: Florence
characters.description: Florence(voiced byLeah Cudmorein the English dub as Terri) is guardianship child-sitter ofB.G.andGeorgewhen theirAunt Aliceis not around. She is studying at college but she loves to spend time with the kids. B.G. especially likes dancing with Terri; who she learns a lot of steps from. Terri: is Breakfast, Lunch, A Dinner Cook: when their parents is not at home. She also likes to Bake Appetizers and Desserts for B.G. and George: such as cookies and cake. Terri especially likes it when they show her their drawings coming from them. Terri: Reveals to be Robbie's Girlfriend.

characters.name: Florence

characters.name: Gad Mansour
characters.description: (EnglishGad Cheb Manzourvoiced byCameron Ansell) Gad is B.G.'s next-door neighbor and informative Best Friend. He is the son: ofAhmed Manzourwho runs a shop on the block and also the Grandson ofOuma; He loves science, school, and studying bugs. His main friends areBGandAlex, sometimesGeorge.Gad's motherdied when he was a baby (shown in episode,Mother's Day), Grandmother Ouma and his Father are the Authorities Parental Guardianship who takes care of him. Gad tries to give Miss. B.G. good advice, however Miss. B.G. does not always follow Gad suggestion and sometimes ignores it. She eventually admits in the end she should have listen to him when all else fails. Gad is caring, nice and a he is a great friend and is a close Contender next The third Place Contender Billy, not too far behind the Victory Winner Miss B.G. and Secound Front Runner-Up: Alex.

characters.name: Gaston
characters.description: George:(voiced byNissae Isen, character originally namedGastonin the French version) isBG's adorable little brother and is almost always seen with his beloved pet hamster, Albert, who travels around perched on George's head. George really looks up to his older sister and always wants to play with her and her friends, especially in the tree house. George tries to be like BG at times, copying her words and actions, and her approval is very important to him. Sensitive and sweet-natured, George is less self-confident than BG, but his insights into people and situations can sometimes be surprising.

characters.name: Gudule
characters.description: originally Gudule in the French versionrenamed BG in English Guduleis the protagonist from the thebooksthat inspired the TV seriesBravo Gudule. (BG:Re-stylized) English Series renamedMiss. BGwhich draws upon the initials of the original show.

characters.name: Ian
characters.description: Ianis friend ofGeorge.

characters.name: Missy
characters.description: MitziisMr. Grant's dog.

characters.name: Mom
characters.description: Charlotte Garcia:(EnglishMomvoiced bySusan Roman) is the mother ofBG,GeorgeandJeffery's Wife.  She works from the house as a freelance journalist and she is always busy trying to juggle her career while looking after her family, meanwhile her World Traveler: Younger sisterAlicecome to visit her Nephew, and Niece. Their Mother is warm, sympathetic and more understanding of her daughter than BG realizes, also she is tough. She doesn't lose her temper very often, but when she does, even Miss. B.G. runs for cover. She wears a green short and red pants.

characters.name: Mr. Grant
characters.description: Mr. GrantisBG,Gad,Alex,Brittany-Ann,Kayla, andBilly's substitute teacher and he has a dog namedMissy.

characters.name: Mrs. Martin
characters.description: Mrs. MartinisMiss.B.G.'sHomeroom Teacher and Classmates Educator. B'G's Classmates:Gad,Alex,Billy,Brittney and Kayla,plus with her other School Student Colleague's. Mrs. Martin notices B.G. easily get distracted in class however the Educator's also notices: B.G.'s hidden Potential; what she does in her Curriculum: Text-Work and Courses. When it is Important: she tries her best to finish what she started: on Time or Late. Class Preparedness: Classmate Student's will ask her;  "if she did her home work assignment's?"  Mrs. Martin is understanding to Miss. B.G. and her Student's gives them Extra- Prep Time: to finish their Work. Miss. B.G.'s Studies: will Come around Eventually!

characters.name: Mrs. McAdams
characters.description: Mrs. McAdamsis the mother ofBrittany-Ann. One of the characters addresses her as "Mrs. McAdams" in one of the episodes.

characters.name: Ouma
characters.description: Ouma(voiced in English byDawn Greenhalgh) isGadCheb'sgrandmother, who lives with him and his dad;Mr. Manzour. She takes care of all the housework, cooking for them and she tends a vegetable garden behind the family grocery store.BGlikes to seek Ouma out when she needs help. Manzour, Mansour's; Denomination Title name:which is unclear if any episode clarifies their Last name. "Ouma's"Real Name:Perhaps might be mentioned on a later Episode. "Ouma;"Origin Real Name:is an Afrikaans word for; ("Grandmother.") Ouma andAlbertare the only characters who retain the same name in both the FrenchBravo Guduleand EnglishMiss BGseries. Her originally designed name isDjeda.

characters.name: Robbie
characters.description: talking to his brother as he mans a carnival booth Thomas(EnglishRobbievoiced byBill Houston) isAlex's older brother. He appears to be datingTerri, and a supporter of the community.
